enums.name: SafetyRiskLevel
enums.doc: AI safety risk assessment levels from SPDX 3.0.1 AI profile. Use to annotate the risk level of an AI model — maps to the SPDX ai_safetyRiskAssessment field.

enums.name: EnergyUnit
enums.doc: Energy measurement units from SPDX 3.0.1 AI profile. Use when recording training, inference, or fine-tuning energy consumption — maps to the SPDX ai_energyUnit field.
